titleStmt.title: SII 38.574: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 574.

p.hi: King: Achyutadēva Year: Śaka 1455, ijaya, Kārttika, Utthānadvādaśi = October 29, 1533 A.D.

summary.p: This inscription gives the titles of the ruling sovereign Achyutadēva. It records that the king made a gift of the villages Chōḷasamudra in the Penukoṇḍarājya, Hampaṇṇapalli and Kañchalarahaḷḷi, after renaming the latter village as Veṇkaṭādrirāya-Samudra, for the merit of his son Veṇkaṭādri-rāya, to the temples at Lēpakshi i.e., Pāpanāsa-liṅga, Ramapati and Vīrabhādra.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī pāpanāśaliṁgasya śrīrāmasyaramāpatēḥ . śrī vīrabhadradēvasya śrīpādakamalaṁ bhajē . lēpākṣi vīrabhadrēṇa bhujyamānāsadāmudā . kumāra śrīveṁkaṭādri
samudra pratināmatāḥ . śrīman haṁpaṇṇapallīti grāmaḥ kaṁcārlahaḷḷēpi . timagauṁḍana haḷīca likhyaṁtētra śilātalē . svasti śrījayābhyudaya śālivāhana śa
kavaruṣaṁgaḷu 1455 neya vijaya saṁvatsarada kārtika śu 12 sa vuthāna dvādaśi puṁṇya kāladalū tuṁgabhadrātīra śrīviṭhalēśvara dēvara saṁnitiyalū śrī
manmahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara pararājabhayaṁkara mūrurāyaragaṁḍa bhāṣege tapuva rāyaragaṁḍa . hiṁdurāyasuratrāṇa śrīvīrapratāpa śrīA
cyutadēva mahārāyaru taṁma kumāra veṁkaṭādrirāyara hesaralū lēpākṣi naṁdilakiseṭe mudamāṁbāvara kumāra penugoṁḍa vīrapaṁṇanavarige nitya
paḍi nayivēdya mānitavāda vayibhavaṁgaḷige penugoṁḍerājya cōḷasamudra
Digital edition of SII 38.574 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
